label: csp-hotfix-intent-redirected
topWin: Live site restored in one surgical commit: removed CSP-blocked onload event handler, added 5 missing inline-script SHA-256 hashes to meta CSP + Worker + canonical + vaultsparked + registry, propagated 88 pages, clean rebase + push.
topGap: The CSS onload event handler was silently broken since S53 CSP hardening. Existing Playwright suite checks HTTP + DOM but not computed styles, so the bug shipped unseen.
ignisNote: A tiny CSP fossil from S53 (leftover inline event handler after 'unsafe-inline' was removed) took down the entire visual render of the live site — hashes don't cover event handlers, and no test asserted computed styles. Fast, clean surgical fix. Pattern: when hardening CSP, audit for inline event handlers, not just inline scripts.
